libraryDescription:
The data.WrappedStack library provides a stack-type data structure.

This module provides the generic struct WrappedStack,which stores stack data,and generic functions such as push and popfor adding and removing data from it.

In data.WrappedStack, elements are implemented as values wrapped and storedin the DataWrapper struct.
Therefore, unlike data.Stack,WrappedStack can handle arrays as elements.

On the other hand, because adding and removing elements involves wrapping theminto the DataWrapper struct, processing becomes heavier than in Stack by that overhead.
Therefore, if the elements are not arrays,using Stack is recommended rather than WrappedStack.

struct0.name: WrappedStack<Type>
struct0.description: The stack struct. It stores stack data.

function0.name: clear<Type>
function0.parameters: (WrappedStack<Type> type) stack : The target stack struct.

function1.name: size<Type>
function1.description: Returns the size currently in use.
function1.parameters: (WrappedStack<Type> type) stack : The target stack struct.

function2.name: push<Type>
function2.description: Adds an element to the stack.
function2.parameters:
(WrappedStack<Type> type) stack : The target stack struct. 
(Type type) value : The element to be added.

function3.name: pop<Type>
function3.description: Removes and returns an element from the stack.The extracted element is deleted from the stack.
function3.parameters: (WrappedStack<Type> type) stack : The target stack struct.

function4.name: peek<Type>
function4.description: Returns an element from the stack without removing it.
function4.parameters: (WrappedStack<Type> type) stack : The target stack struct.

function5.name: contains<Type>
function5.description: Determines whether the stack contains the specified element.
function5.parameters:
(WrappedStack<Type> type) stack : The target stack struct. 
(Type type) element : The element whose presence is to be checked.

function6.name: reverse<Type>
function6.description: Reverses the order of all elements held by the stack.
function6.parameters: (WrappedStack<Type> type) stack : The target stack struct.

function7.name: toDataWrapperArray<Type>
function7.description: Stores all elements held by the stack into a DataWrapper array and returns it.The order is such that the element obtained first by pop or peek becomes [0].
function7.parameters: (WrappedStack<Type> type) stack : The target stack struct.
function7.returnValue: (DataWrapper<Type>[] type) A DataWrapper array containing all elements of the stack.
